title: lindsaea orbiculata
intro: Lindsaea orbiculata, also known as the Fan Leaved Lindsaea or Fan-leaved Lady Fern, is a species of fern in the family Lindsaeaceae. The plant is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the division Pteridophyta, which includes a wide variety of ferns. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use is not widely recognized by modern medicine and more research is needed to confirm its health benefits.
